message:
fix(runtime): reset handling_leaks guard before panic_any unwind

The handling_leaks reentrancy flag was set to true at the start of
handle_obligation_leaks but never reset when panic_any caused a stack
unwind. Since workers recover poisoned mutexes via PoisonError::into_inner,
the flag remained true, silently disabling all future obligation leak
handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
